birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Von der Decken's hornbill (Tockus deckeni) is a hornbill found in East Africa, especially to the east of the East African Rift, from Ethiopia south to Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They are found in Africa in the northern tropics from Senegal and Gambia east through to Ethiopia and then south to southern Angola and Zimbabwe, mostly west of the Rift Valley, but are mostly absent from the western lowland equatorial forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in the African Rift Valley from southern Uganda to northern Tanzania
